summary: Test suite covers core functionality across all modules (parser, checker, reporter, license-lookup) with clear organization and good use of mocks. Act integration tests verify end-to-end behavior through real workflow runs. However, missing edge case coverage (empty inputs, special characters, very large datasets), no direct unit tests for CLI entry point error paths (missing files, invalid config), and first act test has fragile fixture dependencies—it assumes specific default fixture contents without setting them up. Would catch regressions in happy paths but lacks comprehensive error scenario and boundary condition coverage.
